heading: Preserving the Federal Emergency Management Agency
label: 316 Preserving the Federal Emergency Management Agency
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 502 and is classified to .section 506 of Pub. L. 107–296section 312 of this title

children.heading: Distinct entity
children.label: a Distinct entity
children.text: The Agency shall be maintained as a distinct entity within the Department.

children.heading: Reorganization
children.label: b Reorganization
children.text: shall not apply to the Agency, including any function or organizational unit of the Agency.Section 452 of this title

children.heading: Prohibition on changes to missions
children.label: c Prohibition on changes to missions

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary may not substantially or significantly reduce, including through a Joint Task Force established under , the authorities, responsibilities, or functions of the Agency or the capability of the Agency to perform those missions, authorities, responsibilities, except as otherwise specifically provided in an Act enacted after .section 348 of this title1So in original. Probably should be “authorities, responsibilities, or functions”.1October 4, 2006

children.heading: Certain transfers prohibited
children.label: 2 Certain transfers prohibited
children.text: No asset, function, or mission of the Agency may be diverted to the principal and continuing use of any other organization, unit, or entity of the Department, including a Joint Task Force established under , except for details or assignments that do not reduce the capability of the Agency to perform its missions.section 348 of this title

children.heading: Reprogramming and transfer of funds
children.label: d Reprogramming and transfer of funds
children.text: In reprogramming or transferring funds, the Secretary shall comply with any applicable provisions of any Act making appropriations for the Department for fiscal year 2007, or any succeeding fiscal year, relating to the reprogramming or transfer of funds.
